name: worktrees
description: Make a repository worktree-ready and safely route feature edits when policy reserves a coordination checkout.

interface.shortDescription: Worktree isolation, checkout routing, and enforcement.
interface.longDescription: Use Worktrees when Codex needs to make a repository safe for isolated worktree-based development or follow a repository policy that reserves its primary checkout for coordination. The setup skill guides project-specific isolation and classifies clean, genuinely dirty, and upstream-equivalent checkout state without rewriting user work.
defaultPrompt: Make this repository worktree-ready and install the main-checkout guard.
Design per-worktree isolation for this project and generate the bootstrap plan.
Check the repository's worktree policy and route this feature safely before editing.
